content.body: are we prepared to address Waldemar's comments on sigfigs in the Amount proposal?
it seems that our work in https://github.com/tc39/proposal-amount/pull/85 didn't get published; WH appears to have reviewed an old spec text
it looks like there was a CI build failure: https://github.com/tc39/proposal-amount/actions/runs/22568732129
I wonder if we should just do a stage 1 update here; the spec text obviously does not reflect our intentions

AFAICS the significant digits stuff just reiterates discussions we've already had, and addressed, largely in the context of keep-trailing-zeros. The intention was to build on top of keep-trailing-zeros (that's what we did in #85 and which WH doesn't see)
